titleStmt.title: SII 27.172: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 172. (A.R. No. 355 of 1930-31.) HEMMĀḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in front of the Lakshmīnārāyaṇadēva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1448, (1448 current) Vyaya, Chaitra śu. 13, Monday corresponding to 1526 A.D., March 26.

It registers a gift of 60 varāhas per annum to Vyāsatīrthaśrīpāda-voḍeya, for offerings and a perpetual lamp to (the image of) Rāmachandradēva worshipped by him, for the welfare of the king. The gifts was made by Etirāya-voḍeya who was administering Bārakūrurājya under the orders of Liṅgaparasa-voḍeya to whom that territory was given by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1448 saṁdu voṁbhatta
neya varttamāna vyaya saṁvatsarada cayitra śu 13 sōmavāradalu śrīma
nmahā rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra pratāpa śrī kruṣṇarāya ma
hārāyaru vijenagariya siṁhāsanadalu cittayisi samasta duṣṭa ni
graha śiṣṭapratipālaneyāgi sakalavarṁna dharṁmmāśramavanaṁ pratipā
lisuvakāladalu Ā rāyaru bārakūra rājyavanu liṁgarasavoḍeyarige pā
lisi Avara nirūpadiṁda Etirāya voḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kā
ladali śrī kruṣṇarāya mahārāyarige sakala śatrukṣaya mitrārjane Āyu
rārōgya AyiśvaryābhiUradiyāgabēku Eṁdu Etirāyavoḍeyaru
vyāsatīrtha śrīpāda voḍeyaru Ārādhisuva śrīrāmacaṁdra dēvara Amṛtapaḍi
naṁdādīptige biṭṭadāna paṭṭiya kramaveṁteṁdare Aramane bhaṁḍārastaḷake sallu bi
kuḍuva suṁkaguttige ṁvaga 60 Akṣaradalū Aṟuvattu varahanu sōmōpa
rāga puṁṇya kāladalu sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvakavāgi dhāreneredu koṭeu
nanu taṁdukoṁḍu Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyāgi bāḷuviri Eṁdu Etirāya vo
ḍeyaru vyāsatīrtha śrīpāda voḍeyarige sōmōparāga puṁṇyakāladalu sahiraṁṇyō
daka dāna dhārā pūrvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭeU . yiṁtī suṁkavanu
Eraḍukōlusaha sarvvamāṁnya staḷavāgi kuḷavanu kaḍidu nimmavaṁ
śya pāraṁpareyāgi bāḷuviri yeṁdu Etirāya voḍeyaru vyāsatīrtha śrīpāda
voḍeyarige sōmēparāga puṁṇyakāladalu sahiraṁṇyōdaka dāna dhārā
pūrvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu barasikoṭa dharṁma śilāśāsana . dānapālanayō
rmadhyē dānāt śrēyōnupālanaṁ dānāt svarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ pa
daṁ . svadattāṁ vā paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣa sahasrāṇi
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
karaṇika tiṁmarasara baraha
Etirāya voḍeyara vopa
Digital edition of SII 27.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
